comment.text: This key displays the new total storage amount available to a user after a storage plan upgrade. It's used in the StoragePlanUpgrade panel within the Portal Settings, specifically shown when a user has an active storage subscription. The `storageUnit` variable (e.g., Gigabyte) will be dynamically inserted into the text.

usage.context:
<Text fontWeight={600}>
 {!hasStorageSubscription
 ? t("Services:AmoutWithStorageUnit", {
 storageUnit: t("Common:Gigabyte"),
 })
 : t("Services:NewTotalStorage", {
 storageUnit: t("Common:Gigabyte"),
 })}
 </Text>
 <FieldContainer
 isVertical
